title: POS System  ·  Installation Wizard
s1_desc:
Enter the one-time provisioning token (OTPK) and the Legisell URL.
The image tags are provided by the Legisell owner together with the OTPK.
s1_log_fail: ✗ Provisioning failed. Please check token and URL.
s1_log_done: ✓ Provisioning complete! Proceed to the next step.
s2_desc:
Enter the GHCR credentials provided by the Legisell owner.
These are required to pull the Docker images.
s2_creds_found: ✓ GHCR credentials found in {source} — login fields disabled.
s2_log_skip_login: ⏭ Docker login skipped — using existing credentials.
s2_err_no_creds_for_skip: No GHCR credentials found in ~/.docker. Please uncheck and log in.
s2_err_missing: Please enter username, token, and sudo password.
s3_log_pulling: (Pulling images — this may take a few minutes …)
s3_no_docker: ✗ ERROR: 'docker' not found. Please install Docker.
s3_log_pull_fail: ✗ Image pull failed. Please check the GHCR credentials.
s3_log_fail: ✗ Deployment failed. Please check the log.
s3_log_tip: Tip: sudo docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs
err_no_docker: Docker is not installed or not in PATH.
err_no_sudo: sudo is not installed or not in PATH.
skip_no_env: .env not found — please run once without --skip-setup first.
s1_chk_already_provisioned: Credentials were already fetched from Legisell (skip provisioning)
s1_log_skip_provision: ⏭ Provisioning skipped — patching changed image tags only …
s1_err_no_env_for_skip: No .env file found. Please run once without the checkbox to complete provisioning.
s2_backup_pass_provisioned: ℹ Password was set via Legisell Provisioning and pre-filled.
s1_hint_otpk: One-time activation key provided by the Legisell owner.
s1_hint_url: Full URL of the Legisell backend, e.g. https://admin.legisell.de
s1_hint_image_backend: Docker image tag for the backend, e.g. ghcr.io/org/pos-backend:1.2.3
s1_hint_image_frontend: Docker image tag for the frontend service.
s1_hint_image_service: Docker image tag for the image upload service.
s1_hint_image_updater: Docker image tag for the updater sidecar.
s1_hint_image_backup: Docker image tag for the backup sidecar.
s1_hint_deployment_repo: GitHub repo for release notes, format: org/pos-deployment
s1_hint_host_compose_dir: Absolute host path to this directory, e.g. /home/pos-deployment. Required by the updater for self-updates.
s1_hint_tz: IANA timezone for all containers, e.g. Europe/Berlin
s2_hint_token: Personal Access Token with read:packages permission.
s2_hint_sudo: Sudo password of the current user for Docker commands.
s2_hint_backup_user: Username for the Backup Web UI (default: admin).
s2_hint_backup_pass: Password to access the Backup Web UI on port 8300.
